BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: THE MICHELSON FOUND ANIMALS FOUNDATION INC

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: START-UP ACCELERATOR PROGRAM PROVIDES SUPPORT AND ENGAGES WITH PROMISING EARLY-STAGE AND GROWTH-STAGE START-UP COMPANIES WITH A FOCUS ON PET HEALTH, PRODUCTS AND SERVICES.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: PROGRAM PROVIDES FUNDING, INCLUDING STRATEGIC AND OPERATIONAL SUPPORT, PROVIDED FOR LOW COST PET SPAY/NEUTER AND VETERINARIAN CLINICS IN THE SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA AREA.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: ADOPTION PROGRAMS INCLUDE THE OPERATIONS OF THE ADOPT & SHOP CENTERS, SHELTER EVENTS AND OTHER ADOPTION PROMOTIONS, ALONG WITH TRAINING PROGRAMS FOR VOLUNTEERS & SHELTER STAFF.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description4Txt: MICROCHIP PROGRAM INCLUDES R&D COSTS TO IMPROVE MICROCHIP TECHNOLOGY TO ENSURE PROPER ID AND RETURN OF LOST PETS AND SALE/DONATION OF MICROCHIPS TO ANIMAL ORGANIZATIONS.

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: CONV. NOTE - MIXLAB, INC. - TO SUPPORT THE LATEST COMPOUNDING TECHNOLOGY TO CREATE THE HIGHEST QUALITY MEDICATIONS FOR PETS.
SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description2Txt: CONV. NOTE - PETPLATE, INC. - PERSONALIZED MEALS DELIVERED FOR ANIMALS.

RecipientUSAddress.AddressLine1Txt: 2032 West Martin Luther King Jr Bl

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: THE FOUNDATION OPERATES ADOPT & SHOP (A&S), RETAIL STORES/ PET ADOPTION CENTERS LOCATED IN LAKEWOOD AND CULVER CITY, CALIFORNIA. A&S FEATURES VACCINATED, DEWORMED, MICRO-CHIPPED, AND SPAYED OR NEUTERED CATS AND DOGS, DOG DAYCARE, DOG TRAINING, DOG GROOMING SERVICES, AND BASIC PET SUPPLIES.
AS PART OF ITS PROGRAM TO PROVIDE MICROCHIPS TO ENSURE INCREASED CHANCES OF RETURN TO OWNER IF A PET IS EVER LOST,THE FOUNDATION SELLS MICROCHIPS AND SCANNERS TO ANIMAL CARE ORGANIZATIONS NATIONWIDE.

CONV. NOTE - LACUNA DIAGNOSTICS, INC. - DIGITAL CYTOLOGY SOLUTIONS FOR PETS.
